entry.title: Re: 3244147 - How to retrieve the classification data fro...
entry.content: Thanks Prashant, how can I do a "join" in the S4H public cloud under "Custom CDS Views"? With associations I see only the cardinality settings. Where do you maintain the join type settings? That you help a lot. Please advise...

entry.title: Trainer Bar Back Button
entry.content: We received feedback from our learners that the back button in the trainer bar does not return to the previously visited slide; instead, it goes back to the previous slide. Is there a way we can configure this? Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAC Analytic Level Password
entry.content: Requirement is to create multiple application password protected so if department is going to use the id then application wise user should have access in single id. Please let me know if any more information required.

entry.title: Re: SAC Analytic Level Password
entry.content: I assume share application to a certain team( department) could achieve the similar result.

entry.title: Extending SAPUI5 apps: Adaptation projects vs. Extension projects
entry.content:
SAPUI5 flexibility to adapt standard SAP apps

SAPUI5 is SAP’s strategic Web framework for Web applications such as SAP Fiori. In this context, SAPUI5 flexibility offers capabilities to adapt standard apps, not only for developers but also for key users and end users using simple WYSIWYG drag and drop tools. Learn about all the capabilities: SAPUI5 Flexibility - All You Need to Know. SAPUI5 flexibility provides features to realize a clean core approach with on-stack extensions: SAP standard apps remain untouched, no modifications are needed, and even predefined extension points are unnecessary.


SAPUI5 flexibility - Developer adaptation

Developers can leverage the concepts of SAPUI5 flexibility by using SAPUI5 adaptation projects in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS), the development environment of SAP Build Code. Those projects contain all code-based custom adaptations, created in the new Adaptation Editor and other code editors of BAS.

Picture: The new Adaptation Editor in SAP Business Application Studio


Extension project vs. Adaptation project

While adaptation projects are the strategic, advanced technology for code-based extensions of SAPUI5 apps, we also have the predecessor extension projects. To address frequent confusions, I want to summarize the differences to help understanding what you see in your system:

 Extension projectAdaptation project
SAP strategy  Legacy usageStrategic, advanced approach, leveraging SAPUI5 flexibility concepts
Extendonly legacy apps not (yet) compliant to SAPUI5 adaptation projects (1.)most apps, as given in SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library -> Implementation Information -> Extensibility via SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects. (2.)
PrerequisitesIndividual, predefined extension points in each appGeneral enablement of app (1.)
Supported applicationsFreestyle SAPUI5 apps onlyAny SAPUI5 app (freestyle SAPUI5 and SAP Fiori elements apps)
Extension optionsLimited options (e.g. no extension of lifecycle methods)Increased options for all essential app artefacts
Extension locationExtend in predefined extension points onlyExtend anywhere (3.) (unless blocked by application logic)
Stability with upgradesLimited stabilityImproved stability
Future-proof conceptOne layer of changesMultiple layers possible (planned)
Platform supportSAP S/4HANA on-prem onlyAny platform (4.)

Footnotes

  1. Details on prerequisites for respective platforms in Extending SAP Fiori Applications.
  2. If an adaptation project is being created for an app not compliant to SAPUI5 adaptation projects, the wizard in SAP Business Application Studio automatically creates an extension project. (An example for such an app is My Inbox.)
  3. including existing extension points, controller hooks
  4. See details in Features and Availability.

What does this mean for existing extension projects?

If you have an existing extension project, you can continue using it, i.e. running it and also maintaining it. In case a) you are planning to add new extensions due to bigger requirements and b) the underlying standard app supports SAPUI5 adaptation projects (see above), SAP recommends to manually migrate the extension project to an adaptation project to make use of its advanced options. (The UI5 team currently plans to provide guidance for this manual migration.)

Further references

  • Migrate from SAP Web IDE to SAP Business Application Studio: Blog post & Mission
  • SAP Fiori Elements: Adaptation Project – Adding a Custom Filter to the List Report
  • Adaptation Project: Freestyle SAPUI5 App – Adding a Search Link to Items on a Table
  • Work with SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects to extend SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content:
Hi @Ganjos 
Using multiple targets via parameter cannot be done within the DATA-statement. There is however a way to do so via specifying a memberset (line 1) outside of the actual instruction (line 2). The members filter will then automatically applied to the DATA-statement:


Please remember to change the parameter cardinality for targetMonth from Single to Any.

entry.title: Re: SAC Analytic Level Password
entry.content: In that case multiple SAC ID's would be required. Here is single ID for view access and multiple applications needs to access which has to be restricted by password so authorized user can able to access their applications.

entry.title: Purchase Order IV qty is more than GR qty since we set IV based on GR
entry.content:
In production system, we found an purchase order met a problem that rarely happened: PO qty is 30 KG, GR qty is 30 KG, IV qty is 40 KG.(1st IV-30KG, 2nd IV-10KG). 

This purchase order item wasn't be changed. 

and we found Purchasing info record is created before purchase order and click the Purchasing control option"Goods-Receipt-Based Invoice Verification "already.

Pls help to found the reason why it be happened and how to prevent such problem in future.

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - Copy Actual's valu...
entry.content: Dear William, thank you for explaining this major point. This lead me to understand that everything was fine I just had to add a new filter in my data action so that it works on the leaf node.

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - Copy Actual's valu...
entry.content: Dear MoonJun, thank you for your time. I figured out that I was not applying restriction on the leaf node while writing the data action. once i did that, everything was working.

entry.title: Re: Using variable time reference with 0FISCPER for currency translation
entry.content: Hi, Have you got any resolution to this issue, as I'm also facing the same issue I want my reports to show the data as per the posting data of exchange rates. But I'm unable to, also when 0FISCPER is not giving me the correct values.

entry.title: Re: 公司间销售业务的按单生产业务
entry.content: Hi Qi_Liu，感谢你的帮忙支持。

entry.title: Re: Singapore invoice solution
entry.content:
Hello,

as you can see in that list there are several option for SAP Business One. Where the Name of IRSP Prime is a Partner's name that solution is most probably in combination with a partner AddOn - but that you should check with the specific partner. There is one option where the IRSP'name is SAP Asia Pte Ltd; that one is not using Partner AddOn. But you can see in the field Solution Name: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance & SAP Business One. So you should have a subscription for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance as well. SAP Business One supporting directly only SAP Document and Reporting Compliance service.

In case you would like to use other Peppol Gateway (not from SAP) - you should find an AddOn provided (supported) by a partner.

 

Regards

Zoltan Tyukos

entry.title: Re: Need information on migrating from SAML protocol to OIDC
entry.content: BTP has a manual process allowing to switch from SAML to OIDC and keeping the origin. This will involve a short downtime, see the documentation at https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/migration-from-saml-trust-to-openid-connect-trust-with-identity-authentication

entry.title: Re: Can you please post the step by step implementation p...
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: Recipe Name not displayed while Linking recipe to ite...
entry.content:
Dear all,

Issue has been fixed.

Please implement below SAP note.

SNOTE: 3437909 and 3547915

 

Regards

Vishwas

entry.title: Re: Clean Core on-prem, pratical meaning
entry.content: Hello Sujith, thanks for your input and I agree with you that development is just one part of Clean Core. For me the most relevant as I'm responsible for this in the company I'm working. Your answer confirms most of my ideas of our clean core journey. One thing I'm still missing is, how to handle Z-function modules? I don't care about standard FM and their successors but we also use hundrets of Z-function modules. Probably we can't replace all of them with an API. Do you know, if these are clean core compliant or must also be replaced? Clean core will be a journey of several years for us but at least we have to start at some point. First of all, I defined our clean core index to get a better feeling of where we are now. Next we defined new development guidelines to stop classic development and use cloud-first approach whereever possible. During next year, we will evaluate all user-exists and modifications and checks, if they're still needed and how to solve it alternatively. We're on year 2 on S/4 HANA and I recognize, first business colleagues starts to ask for Fiori instead Z-TCode. I hope they will become more.

entry.title: Re: CTMを使用したCloud Integrationの移送設定手順(How to Transport Cloud Integration with TMS in Japanese)
entry.content: @toru_sakai さん

entry.title: Re: CTMを使用したCloud Integrationの移送設定手順(How to Transport Cloud Integration with TMS in Japanese)
entry.content: @toru_sakai さん コメントありがとうございます。双方のBTPアカウントがトライアルの状態で試すことができていないのですが、おそらく双方のBTPアカウントにIntegrationSuiteがサブスクライブされていれば移送は可能ではないかと思います。もしトライアルアカウント間での移送を試された場合は結果を教えていただけると幸いです。よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: Re: [SAC] Values ​​using the formula RESTRICT cannot be d...
entry.content:
Hi @keita 
This should work however the VDT has to show the proper granularity (in your case month). In case the VDT does lead to an unexpected result it sometimes helps to create the same layout using a Table.
If you configure your VDT as follows, you should be able to see the values of your restricted account on month granularity as well:

This might be unexpected as it does not show on quarter or year level any values for your restricted account. Please check the Table in the sample above which shows similar results.

entry.title: Re: ABAP 7.5x Quick Reference
entry.content: Thanks. Possible improvement: the "data types" section is mixing ABAP types and DDIC types without mentioning it; DECFLOAT16 and DECFLOAT34 are new in DDIC since 7.54 but exist in ABAP since 7.02, DF16_SCL and DF34_SCL were obsoleted in 7.40, INT8 was added for both DDIC and ABAP (both in 7.50), the other data types are DDIC types only.

entry.title: Re: Generating High Quality Leads with an SAP Business Network Catalog
entry.content: Thanks @amandalaldin. It would help all. Thanks to Blog author @akashbansode-34!

entry.title: SAP BUILD - Business solution in html5 app is different when I deploy app in Prod
entry.content:
Hi,

I downloaded the app (Fixed Asset, Visibility, MyInbox) from the SAP Build automation store and modified it based on my requirements. It is working good in Dev and QA servers after deployment. When i deploy it in Prod, I see that the system choosing the incorrect business solution and destination as compared to Dev, hence Inbox and Visibility not working. 

I'm not sure how the system decides on the "business solution" and how I can correct it.  Please refer attachment below. 

 

Thanks,

Ajay

entry.title: Re: SAP Business AI : what does it cost?
entry.content: Thanks Finn - love it - as always you managed to answer some of the obvious questions customers, partners and colleagues have in mind while starting to engage in the new world of SAP Business AI 😉. So net net - pretty compelling to get going!

Thanks a lot! I corrected the code snippet in this blog.

Lena

entry.title: Re: Payment run; clearing journal entry
entry.content:
Hi Edna,

Thank you for your feedback. The main question was not how to reverse the payment run, but rather how and whether you can configure one clearing journal entry per payment run?

This is in case we have another error in the payment file and then only have to cancel one clearing document instead of 100.

Thank you in advance for the clarification.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – How to fix Changed and Outdated Catalogs
entry.content:
Hi @Jocelyn_Dart 

On the one hand I want to congratulate you for your great content, you are an absolute genius in Fiori!

On the other hand I would like to tell you about my issue, I have a Technical catalogue that appears as changed. The issue is that it seems that the Fiori App F6437 has been deleted. In the specific client transaction content manager the application does not appear but in cross client it does. Therefore, when I search for the App to add it to a Custom catalogue, it does not appear.

In other clients I can see the App as the technical catalogue does not appear as changed and the App is inside.

In this case, how can I get the technical catalogue back to its original state in the specific content manager client transaction?

Thanks,

best regards

Ruben

entry.title: Unable to Find SDK Version 24.11 in Mobile Cloud Build?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm currently developing an app using the Mobile Development Kit (MDK) on Business Application Studio (BAS) with SDK version 24.11. However, I've encountered an issue where the Mobile Cloud Build service only supports up to version 24.7.5. This limitation is preventing me from building my app with the latest SDK version.

Has anyone else faced this issue? Is there a workaround or a way to build the APK using SDK version 24.11 in the Mobile Cloud Build service without resorting to the MDKClient_SDK?

Any help or guidance would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Unit of Measure in Service Purchase Order
entry.content:
Service PO can only have ONE UoM and which is mandatory while creating the services using AC01 and there is no work around in standard SAP to manage multiple UoM for ONE Service.

The best practice to create & manage multiple services with different UoM so that as a Standard SAP you can create the Service PO with different Unit.

entry.title: Theme-specific CSS for your application
entry.content:
Do you have self-developed applications built with SAPUI5, UI5 WebComponents, Fundamental NGX or even one of SAPs classic UIs? Or e.g. your own in-house SAPUI5 component library? Then, it is likely that you've felt the need for theme-specific CSS.

How it was: JavaScript and FOUC

In the past, this was barely possible. In the SAPUI5 world, you had to resort to the Parameters.get() API and create your CSS in JavaScript. In general, you had to inspect the applied theme at runtime, using JavaScript, and serve your theme-specific CSS based on the inspection result. This leads to flashes-of-unstyled-content (FOUC), which, again, has to be treated.

What we have now: sapSapThemeId

But not anymore! [1]

With theming base content 11.23.0, we introduced the new theming parameter sapSapThemeId. This parameter always contains the technical id of the SAP-provided theme the applied theme is based on (in case of a custom-theme) or of the applied theme itself. I.e. --sapSapThemeId of sap_horizon is sap_horizon, and sapSapThemeId of my_horizon (a custom theme based on sap_horizon) is also sap_horizon.

Disclaimer: use existing parameters

The technique I'm about to describe, is a "last resort" solution. Always check first

  1. if there is already a theming parameter you could use instead – Use the parameter explorer of the theming base content to get an overview of what's already there;
  2. if it would make sense to add a theming parameter to the theming base content – Write a comment here, create an issue for the theming base content or contact the development team directly.

Only if both checks are answered negatively, you should use sapSapThemeId to bring your own "delta" css.

The idea: container style queries

The idea is to craft a container style query against --sapSapThemeId (the CSS custom property version of sapSapThemeId), and define your own custom properties based on the result. In the example, I'll use relative colors to darken a background in light themes and lighten it in dark themes; and I'll use CSS nesting for a more concise example; but both are not strictly necessary.

Example: a custom list item

As an example, imagine the background color of a custom list item (which is identified by the CSS class myListItem). It should depend on sapList_Background, but be 10% darker than that in light themes, 10% lighter than that in dark themes, with 30% instead of 10% for high-contrast themes.

For that, we'll create our own CSS custom property, --myList_Background, that defaults to --sapList_Background:

 

:root {
  --myList_Background: var(--sapList_Background);
}

 

Next, we'll use that custom property in the .myListItem selector:

 

.myListItem {
  background-color: var(--myList_Background);
}

 

And now, we'll overwrite the value of --myList_Background in the body selector based on the container style query value of --sapSapThemeId:

 

body {
  /* light low-contrast themes */
  @container style(--sapSapThemeId: sap_horizon)
          or style(--sapSapThemeId: sap_fiori_3) {
    /* darken by 10% */
    --myList_Background: hsl(from var(--sapList_Background) h s calc(l - 10));
  }
  /* dark low-contrast themes */
  @container style(--sapSapThemeId: sap_horizon_dark)
          or style(--sapSapThemeId: sap_fiori_3_dark) {
    /* lighten by 10% */
    --myList_Background: hsl(from var(--sapList_Background) h s calc(l + 10));
  }
  /* light high-contrast themes */
  @container style(--sapSapThemeId: sap_horizon_hcw)
          or style(--sapSapThemeId: sap_fiori_3_hcw) {
    /* darken by 30% */
    --myList_Background: hsl(from var(--sapList_Background) h s calc(l - 30));
  }
  /* dark high-contrast themes */
  @container style(--sapSapThemeId: sap_horizon_hcb)
          or style(--sapSapThemeId: sap_fiori_3_hcb) {
    /* lighten by 30% */
    --myList_Background: hsl(from var(--sapList_Background) h s calc(l + 30));
  }
}

 

That's it, now our custom list item has a custom background that is still connected to the official theming variables, and that depends on the actually applied theme.

A bit of background: container style queries

So, why does that work?

MDN does a good job explaining container style queries, so this is just a small gist.

The --sapSapThemeId custom property is, like all custom properties of the theming base content, defined at :root, which usually is the <html> element. It is crucial that this also is a containment context (the outermost containment context even).

The <body> is inside :root (the <html>), so container styles applied to the <html> containment context have an effect on the <body>.

The CSS

 

body {
  @container style(--sapSapThemeId: sap_horizon) {
    --myList_Background: #c0ffee;
  }
}
/* which is a more concise version of */
@container style(--sapSapThemeId: sap_horizon) {
  body {
    --myList_Background: #c0ffee;
  }
}

 

could be read as

  • In any container (@container without a <container-name>),
  • on which the custom property --sapSapThemeId has the value sap_horizon,
  • in body elements (which is only the one <body> that contains all visible parts of an html page)
  • the custom property --myList_Background
  • has the value #c0ffee

In the example, we also used relative colors, which could be the topic of a separate blog post.

Recap: theme-specific CSS without JavaScript

We have seen that since theming base content 11.23.0, which will soon be available in SAPUI5 (likely version 1.132, but I can't promise anything) and classic UIs (UR/c2 2413), you can write a container style query against --sapSapThemeId to change values of your own CSS custom properties, or even add theme-specific selectors.

Please try that out and leave a comment how it went.

Footnotes

[1] The described technique relies on container style queries for custom properties, actively implemented but not yet supported in Firefox (see tracking bug 1795622)

entry.title: Re: can not delete schema
entry.content:
Hi,

Please go through the sap note 2870701.

You may also try to restart the HANA Db and check if that helps

Regards,

Prithviraj

entry.title: Get Pop up Error'*** Please click here to sign-in again and continue working.' when login SAP for ME
entry.content:
Currently, I can log in to the "SAP for me", but when I raise a case, I am prompted to log in again.
I get stuck in a loop on the same screen, but I can't vote.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Get Pop up Error'*** Please click here to sign-in aga...
entry.content:
According to KBAKBAhttps://me.sap.com/notes/3543390/E .

The Error occurred when you login to SAP for Me page.

Error Information: Due to inactivity your browser session expired. Reloading may cause any unsaved data to be lost. Please click here to sign-in again and continue working." 

This kind of error is a normal SAPFORME timeout error which will last for 60 mins. And if it occurs, you can just click on the icon 'click here' to sign in again.

entry.title: Re: SAP instance reached state SHUTDOWN after having stat...
entry.content:
Hi,

Could you please if the hostname and fully qualified hostname are set correctly?

As per the log, it says 

M  *** ERROR => ThSetGwParam : NiHostToAddr CYQECC6.CYQECC6.cyber.net.pk failed [thParam.c    3482]

Is this the correct hostname name?

Check the hosts file and parameter SAPLOCALHOST, SAPLOCALHOSTFULL.

Regards,

Prithviraj

entry.title: SAP Practice
entry.content: I want to practice my knowledge of SAP I am practicing to give SAP  C_TS4FI_2023 certification How Could I practice on demo system?

entry.title: Re: SAP instance reached state SHUTDOWN after having stat...
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: SAP instance reached state SHUTDOWN after having stat...
entry.content: Hi Prithviraj, yes it is correct hostname

entry.title: Re: CPI Partner Directory User Interface in SuperEasy Extension
entry.content:
Hello @fatihpense ,
This is a wonderful tool and I have been using this for a while. but I recently started seeing the below error for both Edge and Chrome extension option -
Could you please review this and help us correcting this?
Chrome version used - Version 126.0.6478.185 (Official Build) (64-bit)

Edge version used - 

Version 131.0.2903.86 (Official build) (64-bit)
 
 

Thanks

Sugata

entry.title: Re: EC Payroll off cycle before the last pay date (MX)
entry.content:
Hello!

to avoid problems with the retro-calculation, I would suggest you to change te payment date on V_T549S_B for this specific period. To execute the normal payroll again, due the payment date is saved on payment results and after that to run the off-cycle.

Regards!

Johnatan

entry.title: Re: Questions about single and multi tenant BTP deployment
entry.content:
Hello YanGerzon,

I would recommend you to check the BTP help portal section about Setting Up Your Account Model for detailed explanation of the options. 

Regarding question 1) there is still the option to create a second  CF spaces and have your test environment there. For this setup to work the "productive" application should require less then 500 MB of CF Runtime memory, so that there is also Runtime Memory for the test deployment. Otherwise you won't be able to deploy your test enhancement. Cloud Foundry supports also space quotas and member management on space level. I hope this helps.

entry.title: OUT NOW: Standard integration of SAP Signavio with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
In today’s rapidly evolving digital landscape, effective business transformation is more crucial than ever. This journey, from strategy to execution, is where SAP shines by integrating key dimensions—processes, applications, people, and data—into a streamlined approach. The best practice approach for SAP Cloud ERP is called RISE with SAP Methodology, which includes a standardized framework, pre-defined content and leverages SAP's integrated tool chain, guided by experts.  

At the heart of successful business transformation lies enterprise architecture. This framework aligns IT strategy with business objectives, enhancing both agility and efficiency. SAP stands out as a leader in this space, offering a unified platform that facilitates quick insights during strategy formulation and seamless adaptability during execution. By providing an integrated toolchain, SAP empowers businesses to realize the full potential of their transformation tools. 

SAP Signavio Process Manager is the leading tool for business process documentation and provides together with SAP Signavio Collaboration Hub the market leading collaboration platform to collaboratively define and optimized business processes, enabling organizations to remain competitive in today’s fast-paced environment.  

SAP Cloud ALM orchestrates the entire process of transforming customers' IT landscape, catering to the evolving needs of an agile enterprise. From fit-to-standard analysis and requirement capturing to project management, test automation, and final deployment, this cloud-based tool ensures that strategies translate effectively into execution. 

That is why we are thrilled to announce the integration of SAP Signavio with SAP Cloud ALM. This powerful combination supports an integrated lifecycle approach and aligns perfectly with the ERP Clean Core strategy. 

 

Benefits of Integration 

The synergy between SAP Signavio and SAP Cloud ALM accelerates business process transformation by ensuring continuous synchronization of process information. Here are some key benefits of the integration of SAP Signavio with SAP Cloud ALM being released this November: 

  • To-Be Process Models: Easily transfer process models from SAP Signavio to SAP Cloud ALM for streamlined implementation. 
  • Enhanced Collaboration: Bridge the gap between business and IT, fostering improved collaboration across teams. 
  • Consistent Structure: Deliver a consistent process structure and data synchronization between SAP Signavio and SAP Cloud ALM. 

 

Capabilities of the Integration 

This integration is not just about collaboration; it also offers powerful capabilities: 

  • Connection of SAP Signavio with SAP Cloud ALM through an SAP-owned connectivity 
  • Sync of the latest to-be process models from SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub to SAP Cloud ALM 
  • Navigation to SAP Cloud ALM directly from SAP Signavio after successful sync 
  • Blocking of solution process flow diagram in SAP Cloud ALM for editing 
  • Navigation from synchronized to-be process model in SAP Signavio to solution process diagram in SAP Cloud ALM and the other way around 

 

Looking to the future, SAP Signavio plans deeper integration with SAP Cloud ALM through incremental development, further unlocking value throughout your transformation journey. For latest planned innovations please check SAP Road Map Explorer. 

To fully realize the potential of business transformation, it's essential to strategically combine people, processes, and solutions. As you leverage SAP’s comprehensive toolset, keep in mind that the path from strategy to execution can be complex, but with the right tools and integrations, businesses can embrace the transformation and navigate this journey with confidence and agility.   

Learn more about the integration of SAP Signavio with SAP Cloud ALM:

  • L1 Deck 
  • Getting Started Guide (SAP Help) 
  • SAP Road Map Explorer 
  • Driving Continuous Innovation Through Integrated Cloud Transformation

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] Joule – Getting Started with Joule and SAP SuccessFactors

entry.content: Hi Nayamath,

entry.title: Re: #COE #BA01 Notifying users when Supplier Invoice work...
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,

For question 1: Please view Fiori App "Flexible Workflow Administration".

For question 2: In current release version of the system, there is no available setting to send email notification when supplier invoice workflow is in Error. User can use App Flexible Workflow Administration to view the supplier invoices with workflow status of Error. Hope it helps.

Thanks and Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: Invalid Schema Name TestCompany
entry.content: Hi Manish , How _DT to be defined

entry.title: Re: [SAC] Values ​​using the formula RESTRICT cannot be d...
entry.content: Thank you for your answer, Tomas. I'm very happy to know that it's possible. However, I can't set it up as shown in the image. I'd like to know more about VDT settings. 〇I was successful in displaying it in a table. 〇How did you set the Restrict A node in the lower left of the image? I'd like to know more about it. Did you set the formula you defined in the modeler in the story build tab? Or is it possible to create a VDT from a table?

entry.title: Re: Virtual element field displays but is duplicated for every work item
entry.content: @AbhishekSharma Do you have any possible insights on the virtual elements implementation?

entry.title: SAP EarlyWatch Alert
entry.content:
*年即将结束，我司SAP S/4 PERSON_NAME系统已上线1年，都没有做过SAP持续质量检查，
因此请帮忙为我的的SAP S/4 PERSON_NAME生产系统做一次SAP EarlyWatch Alert，
Thank you.




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP EarlyWatch Alert
entry.content:
尊敬的客户：

您好！

如果贵司有solution manager系统，可以参照KBA 2729186 - General processes of EWA generation in SAP Solution Manager 7.2来生成EWA报告。

如果不方便用solution manager系统生成，可以致电给CIC，请CIC为你定制EWC服务，EWC全名叫Early Watch Check比EWA报告多一个parameter相关的内容。但是这个CIC能否为您订制EWC报告要根据您的合同类型，详情请参考下记Note致电CIC咨询。

SAP Note: 560499 - Customer Interaction Center: Hotline - Email - Chat

Customer Interaction Center (CIC) Support Portal page

以上

高媛

entry.title: Re: General ledger distribution and assessment

entry.title: Re: Warn users before logging them off
entry.content: For this kind of message, I call FM TH_POPUP.

entry.title: VarPay Export timeslices without Business Goals
entry.content:
Hi Team,

is it possible to do an export/report that shows Variable Pay timeslices without Business Goals? When I select the Bonus Payout Detail Report in Executive Review those timeslices without Business Goals (e.g. because they were missing in Business Goal Upload file) are missing. I also tried to build a report but this also skips the entries without a goal.

 

Thanks 

Rebecca

entry.title: Currency conversion in Central Invoice Management
entry.content:
We try to process an invoice in SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management, with a currency other than the company code currency.

Company code currency: EUR
Invoice currency: USD

The exchange rates are maintained in the S4 Public Cloud System.
The Currency Exchange Rate Parameter file is imported in CIM. (Not sure if this is necessary?)

When we try to submit the invoice in CIM we get the next error: "An error occurred during currency conversion. Please check if the required configuration is maintained."

When we click first "extensive edit" and only then try to submit (which is actually in the S4 system), the invoice gets posted.

Can someone inform why the error in CIM is raised and how we can solve this?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Adobe Forms Barcode is printed over Border
entry.content: I have one more question if you know. The Barcode is a little to small now. Its not scaled over the entire width of the form. So its a little complicated to scan. Thank you for your help!

Hi Guiseppe,

 

thank you for bringing this up. We will correct this accordingly. Next regular deployment should be around end of January 2025.

Kind Regards

Volker

entry.title: Re: SAP EarlyWatch Alert
entry.content: ACC

entry.title: Stock Valuation split of Mat. Lab. Ovhd.
entry.content: SAP Business One How can I get a stock value report showing material, labour, overhead

entry.title: Planning for the Future: Insights on Transitioning from SAP C4C Sales Service Cloud V1 to V2
entry.content:
As we step into 2025, we are actively planning for the future of our SAP CX landscape and evaluating the transition from C4C V1 to V2. Currently, we have a globally live SAP C4C system with a mix of medium to complex PDI developments.

We are eager to hear from others who have successfully made this shift! Specifically, we’d love to learn about:

  • Your migration journey: How was the process of transitioning from V1 to V2?
  • Required tools and skills: What expertise did your team need? Did you leverage any specific tools or frameworks for the transition?
  • Change management strategies: How did you handle change management, both for development processes and for end-users?

For context, our team has solid experience Technically with : SAP CI (aka CPI), Kyma, and a basic understanding of BAS and CAP and 

Functionally : Lead to Order Processes.

We are looking for holistic insights into the implementation, challenges, and best practices for maintaining and optimizing the system post-migration.

Looking forward to engaging discussions and learning from your experiences!

Best regards,
Dhruvin

entry.title: Re: Importing Scope from the Digital Discovery Assessment into SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
Hi Tomasz,

Thanks for the kind words and your questions.

I can confirm that the selection of the Baseline Accelerator bundle is mandatory. This bundle ensures that you've selected the minimum scope that's required for a well-functioning SAP S/4HANA Cloud solution.

As for the content version: If the import of the JSON file is not done directly after export from the Digital Discovery Assessment, it can occur that the content version differs from that of the target system as there may have been a hotfix or an update for SAP S/4HANA Cloud in the meantime (for example, 2408.4). However, this shouldn't be an issue as SAP Central Business Configuration lets you know if any scenario had to be rejected.

As for the country/region limit: It's true that we recommend a maximum of 5 countries/regions to be implemented at once per wave for optimal performance. If this warning comes up, this typically means that you would exceed that limit, so it seems like you already may have selected several countries/regions before starting the import.

Hope that helps. To learn more about the scope import, you can also go to this SAP Help Portal page.

Best regards, 
Fabian

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Off - Floating Holidays
entry.content: asterisk is not showing in calendar. For both fixed and floating holiday the view is same. Is the view updated now?

entry.title: 'Internal error; contact system administrator' : send email to new users on Cloud Identity Services
entry.content:
We import new user on CPI application with csv and then click on SEND to send the users initial onboarding email.

For past few days when we click on SEND, below error is received.

There are no changes done on SMTP settings or application.

There are no changes done to email template as well.

The 'RESET email' works and user receive email from Cloud Identity Services.

Same error is observed while setting initial password for a customer.

entry.title: Re: Complex File Operations on SFTP using SAP Intelligent RPA
entry.content: I also encountered a similar problem, many components do not support sFTP

entry.title: eclipse find&replace ignores paste command
entry.content:
Using the latest Eclipse / ADT (but it happened also with the previous versions), I hit ctrl-F to start find&replace: I enter the "find" string "/ui2/cl_json", move to the "replace" field and hit ctrl-V, to paste the stored valued "z_ui2_json".

Nothing happens.... or rather: the field remains empty, but the text was pasted into the sourcecode at the cursor position, which is definitely NOT what I was looking for.

Can anyone else reproduce this behaviour? I'd call it a bug, or at the very least an incomplete feature.

entry.title: Re: BAPI /SCWM/MFG_RECEIVE_HUS_EXT to Receive HUs for EWM...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use the interface /SCWM/IF_API_MFG_RECEIVING method RECEIVE_HU. 

Method REVERSE_HUS is also available in this interface.

Best Regards

Paul

entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to...
entry.content: Thank you, I hoped for an other solution because custom odata service also means custom adaption project to change the OData Service. But neverless nice Blog

entry.title: Re: Operating a multi-tenant solution on BTP CF - 1 GB Ru...
entry.content:
Hi @Marco_Dorn,

I apologize for bringing up this topic again after nearly 2.5 years. I hope you can still assist me or provide some information, as the documentation on this matter is quite sparse. The Global Account is still based on the subscription-based model.

We’ve recently noticed a change in the configuration of "Space Quotas." When editing a "Space Quota", it is now possible to specify how many routes can be assigned to a specific plan. 

In my subaccount, I have assigned 6 units of Cloud Foundry Runtime. In the past, this meant I had 6 GB of runtime and 60 routes available. Under the input field for routes, it correctly states "Org Quota: 60." However, I can now assign any arbitrary value (including -1 for "Unlimited" routes) without receiving a warning when saving.

Does this mean that the limitation (1 GB of runtime provides 10 assignable routes) no longer exists, or does this limitation still apply even though I can assign "Unlimited" routes to my space? If the limitation still exists, what happens if I exceed the Org Quota (e.g., using 61 routes in my example)? Will the application no longer run, or will I be charged afterward for routes that exceed the Org Quota? Is there any usage analysis available for the routes being used?

Unfortunately, the SAP Help pages don’t provide answers to my questions, and it seems that only the used GB are considered as a metric, not the routes:
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/cloud-foundry-environment#service-plans-and-metering-for-cloud-foundry-runtime

Thank you for your help!

Best regards,
Johannes

entry.title: How to handle constantly changing host key of SFTP server
entry.content:
Hello, 
I've a requirement of maintaining the known host file of an SFTP server, but each time I'm trying to obtain the host key fingerprint in the connectivity test in BTP monitoring, I'm getting a different host key every time and it is proving to be hard to maintain it in the known host file. 

when I tried to communicate to the owner of the SFTP server, they said they have set it in a way that it'll change dynamically each time we try to obtain the key. Which is why I'm getting an error while connecting to the server afterwards.

any ideas about how to go about this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Schedule Post Closing and Opening Balances - Italy
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I would like to ask you about the job via Schedule Post Closing and Opening Balances (F6182) - Italy.

We are wondering if this is necessary to run the job for all ledgers? Currently we run it for our local ledger 0L but we are not sure if we should run it for 2L (leading ledger IFRS). From accounting perspective we don't need it in 2L but we are wondering if there is any technical/functional issues when there will be a difference between ledgers? 

Thanks,

Kamil

entry.title: How to migrate EWM Objects public cloud with Multiple Storage locations under one Warehouse number
entry.content:
Hello,

Can anyone tell me how to migrate EWM objects using the templates of SAP Cloud when you manage 3 different Storage Locations from 3 different Plants in 1 Warehouse number. The templates does not have a field column were you can put in the Storage location.

MDM Data quality

MDM Data ModelingRange of domains that can be supported “Is there a range of customers, products, employees, etc.
Is it multi-domain?”

Best Reagrds,
kenji Eimura

entry.content:
Dear community,

we use Employee Central and Learning. In EC, we use the alternative Name field to enter the chinese names of our colleagues.

Is there any possibility to send the alternative names also to LMS? but not in a custom field? We want to use the chinese name in the certificate templates. 

I'm happy for any advice how to solve this.

 

Many thanks,

Janine

Hi experts,

does anyone of you know if it is possible to get data from other data sources than the MDOs for the Manage Dashboards app?

Thank you!

entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

How to see last modified user in any of the automatic process in sap sf lms?

After release 2h2024 our admins are receiving mails from Process VLS attendance APM. 

Thanks,

Mounika

entry.title: Re: scope item 6VP
entry.content: Scope Item 6VQ is not available in the public cloud, only in private cloud and on-premise in combination with universal parallel accounting.

entry.title: Strange SELECT behaviour
entry.content:
If I use this statement

SELECT SUM(Debit) - SUM(Credit) FROM A_Purchase_Ledger WHERE Supplier_ID = 16

It returns 0 as the sum of debit is 250 and the sum of credit is 250. However, in this...

SELECT A_Purchase_Ledger.Supplier_ID AS 'SupplierID', 
A_Purchase_Ledger.Credit AS 'Credit', 
A_Purchase_Ledger.Document_Date AS 'DocDate', 
A_Purchase_Ledger.P_Description As 'DocDesc', 
A_Purchase_Ledger.Document_No AS 'DocNumber', 
Suppliers.Bank_BankName AS 'BankName', 
Suppliers.Bank_RoutingNumber AS 'RoutingNumber', 
Suppliers.Bank_AccountName AS 'AccountNumber', 
Suppliers.Bank_AccountName AS 'AccountName', 
Suppliers.Due_Days AS 'DueDays', 
(SELECT(SUM(A_Purchase_Ledger.Credit) - SUM(A_Purchase_Ledger.Debit))WHERE A_Purchase_Ledger.Supplier_ID = SupplierID) as 'TotalBalance'
FROM A_Purchase_Ledger 
INNER JOIN Suppliers ON A_Purchase_Ledger.Supplier_ID = Suppliers.Supplier_ID 
WHERE A_Purchase_Ledger.Paid = 'N' AND A_Purchase_Ledger.Hold = 0 AND 
A_Purchase_Ledger.eCheck_Pending = 0 AND A_Purchase_Ledger.eSig_Required = 0 
AND Type = 'PI' AND dateadd(day,Suppliers.Due_Days, A_Purchase_Ledger.Document_Date) <= current date
GROUP BY A_Purchase_Ledger.Supplier_ID, Credit, Document_Date, P_Description, Document_No, Bank_BankName, Bank_RoutingNumber, Bank_BankName, Bank_AccountName, Due_Days

It returns 250.00. Any ideas what the heck I am doing wrong?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Client 8.00
entry.content:
Dear @sandra_thimme 

Is it possible to disable the favorites panel button (star in the upper left corner)? We face the challenge that end users are using this panel to bookmark GUI transactions. This bypasses the company's UX strategy, which is defined via a Fiorilaunchpad.
The Fiorilaunchpad is invoked in the Business Client to provide the ability to launch legacy applications in the SAP GUI for Windows.

We have already tried the known configuration files (options xml) without success.

any hint is appreciated.

Thanks and best regards

Mathias

entry.title: Re: Invoice RPA Bot - one mail address multiple company c...
entry.content: I would work with PowerAutomate and Syntex on this. But there is my problem - we do not have the experience to build a solution on this.

entry.title: Re: IBP Excel Case Sensitivity
entry.content:
Hi Phil,

We had this exact same issue.  We were having CustomerA and CUSTOMERA being treated as separate values (and inconsistent as to how it showed on different planning objects), so filtering was giving us terrible results.  We fixed it at source by using UPPER when loading the text data out of SAP into IBP (assuming you are using CIDS).  This forced all the text to be in upper case.  We fixed this about 18 months ago now so SAP may have actually done something to improve how IBP handles cases.  As info we pull out of S4 not ECC but it should make no difference.

Hope that helps,

Jez

entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to extend Metadata without own SEGW Service?

Marcel

entry.title: Re: Extending Decimal Places for Currency Amounts in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Ernesto,

Is it correct that SAP set the currency decimals according to ISO 4217, is there any SAP note referring to this?

entry.title: Re: How to Use Custom Fields in Sales Document BAPIs
entry.content:
Hi @krishna_ABAP ,
I just tested in our system and it was working as expected with the following coding:

Maybe you missed to add the sales order number to the variable lr_item_ext->key ?

 

REPORT zsd_bapi_extensibility.

DATA lo_bapi_mapping TYPE REF TO if_cfd_bapi_mapping.
DATA lt_item         TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapisditm.
DATA lt_itemx        TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapisditmx.
DATA lr_header_ext   TYPE REF TO bape_sdsalesdoc.
DATA lr_item_ext     TYPE REF TO bape_sdsalesdocitem.
DATA lt_item_ext     TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bape_sdsalesdocitem.
DATA lt_bapiparex    TYPE bapiparextab.
DATA lt_return       TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapiret2.
DATA ls_order_header_inx TYPE bapisdh1x.


CLEAR ls_order_header_inx.
ls_order_header_inx-updateflag = 'U'.

" Fill header custom fields
CREATE DATA lr_header_ext.
lr_header_ext->data-yy1_test_head_text_sdh = 'Hell2'.
lr_header_ext->datax-yy1_test_head_text_sdh = 'X'.

" Do header custom fields mapping
lo_bapi_mapping = cl_cfd_bapi_mapping=>get_instance( ).

TRY.
    lo_bapi_mapping->map_to_bapiparex_single( EXPORTING ir_source_structure = lr_header_ext
                                              CHANGING  ct_bapiparex        = lt_bapiparex ).
  CATCH cx_cfd_bapi_mapping INTO DATA(lx_cfd_bapi_mapping_error).

ENDTRY.

" Fill Item Fields
" You cannot fill item custom fields here!
lt_item  = VALUE #( ( itm_number = '000010' )
                    ( itm_number = '000020' ) ).
lt_itemx = VALUE #( ( updateflag = 'I' itm_number = '000010' )
                    ( updateflag = 'I' itm_number = '000020' ) ).

" Fill item custom fields
CREATE DATA lr_item_ext.
lr_item_ext->data-yy1_test_item_text_sdi = 'TESTY'.
lr_item_ext->datax-yy1_test_item_text_sdi = 'X'.
lr_item_ext->key = '0000022600000010'.
INSERT lr_item_ext->* INTO TABLE lt_item_ext.

CREATE DATA lr_item_ext.
lr_item_ext->data-yy1_test_item_text_sdi = 'TESTX'.
lr_item_ext->datax-yy1_test_item_text_sdi = 'X'.
lr_item_ext->key = '0000022600000020'.
INSERT lr_item_ext->* INTO TABLE lt_item_ext.

" Do item custom fields mapping
GET REFERENCE OF lt_item_ext INTO DATA(ltr_item_ext).

TRY.
    lo_bapi_mapping->map_to_bapiparex_multi( EXPORTING ir_source_table = ltr_item_ext
                                             CHANGING  ct_bapiparex    = lt_bapiparex ).
  CATCH cx_cfd_bapi_mapping INTO lx_cfd_bapi_mapping_error.

ENDTRY.

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE'
  EXPORTING
    salesdocument    = '0000022600'
    order_header_inx = ls_order_header_inx
  TABLES
    return           = lt_return
    order_item_in    = lt_item
    order_item_inx   = lt_itemx
    extensionin      = lt_bapiparex.

" Commit Work
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'.

 

If it is not working for you, please post your coding here.
best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to have a monthly timesheet that is no...
entry.content:
Hello Brandon,

yes, this is correct for the time being. However, the team works already on allowing different monthly time sheets than based on the calendar month. Your customers use case would be able to be covered. So, watch the release rollout sessions for H1 carefully. But at this point in time I can give no guarantees if they can finish developments cause we have got currently lots on the plate. But chances are good and the path is set.

Best regards

Volker

Kind regards,

Joanna

entry.title: Re: XI: RFC or ABAP Proxy ? ....ABAP Proxies with attachments
entry.content:
Dears,

we also have a requirement where in soap response from cloud we're getting attachments which we can see in srt_util response multipart but code is only reading the xml content. we referred  @ketann post above but still no luck could please any one help me out.

IF wa_yhrt_wps_conf-sender = 'BSK'.

  TRY.
      CREATE OBJECT prxy_bsk_wps_out
        EXPORTING
          logical_port_name = 'LP_t'.

      CALL METHOD prxy_bsk_wps_out->si_wps_mq_out_sync
        EXPORTING
          output = it_wps_request
        IMPORTING
          input  = it_wps_response.

      COMMIT WORK.

      DATA: msgid_prot     TYPE REF TO if_wsprotocol_message_id,
            lo_clientproxy TYPE REF TO zwps_co_si_wps_mq_out_sync,
            msgguid        TYPE sxmsmguid,
            att_prot       TYPE REF TO if_wsprotocol_attachments,
            atts           TYPE prx_attach.


      FIELD-SYMBOLS:<att>           TYPE REF TO if_ai_attachment.
      CREATE OBJECT lo_clientproxy
        EXPORTING
          logical_port_name = 'LP_t'.

      msgid_prot     ?= lo_clientproxy->get_protocol( if_wsprotocol=>message_id ).
      msgguid = msgid_prot->get_message_id( ).

*get attchment data of response
      att_prot ?= lo_clientproxy->get_protocol( if_wsprotocol=>attachments ).
      atts = att_prot->get_attachments( ).

      READ TABLE atts ASSIGNING <att> INDEX 1.
      IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
*Get attachment content from response
        xi_attachment-content = <att>->get_binary_data( ).
*Get filename
        filename = <att>->get_document_name( ).
* Get extension
        mime_type = <att>->get_content_type( ).

        CALL FUNCTION 'sdok_file_name_extension_get'
          EXPORTING
            mimetype  = mime_type
          IMPORTING
            extension = extension.
*Build filename.extension
        CONCATENATE filename '.' extension INTO xi_attachment-filename.

        COMMIT WORK.
      ENDIF.

      CREATE OBJECT lo_fault.
    CATCH cx_ai_system_fault INTO lo_fault.
      WRITE 😕 lo_fault->errortext.
  ENDTRY.

ELSE.

ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Cannot able to access the Latest candidate workbench...
entry.content:
Dear Monika, this is coming too late for you, but for anybody else stumbling across this question for us the following worked:
Open Job Application template -> Change something in the field mentioned in the error (such as adding a description) -> Publish again.

(SELECT SUM(A_Purchase_Ledger.Credit)- SUM(A_Purchase_Ledger.Debit)FROM A_Purchase_Ledger WHERE A_Purchase_Ledger.Supplier_ID = SupplierID) as 'TotalBalance'

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Client 8.00

But to be honest this might be next year. Until then I wish you and your loved ones a peaceful holiday and a healthy and prosperous start to 2025. Kind Regards, Sandra

entry.title: Re: Screen exits in HUPAST

I don't understand how to update vepo at this moment... Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SM49 & SM69 Wildcard external commands error
entry.content: Very helpful blog, thank you!

entry.title: How to detect from a Custom Widget that I am in the story edit / design mode?
entry.content:
I want certain functionalities of my custom widget to be only available while in edit mode in the story design.

Looking at the console, it seems that there should be a way to detect it.

How can I detect that I am in the edit mode through my widget's source code?
